rawText: Proficient software engineer with \textbf{2+} years of experience, excelling in design principles, rigorous testing, and innovative implementation. Adaptable and self-driven, demonstrating the capacity to rapidly acquire and implement new technologies and methodologies. Applied strong technical and collaborative skills through the completion of \textbf{10+} self-initiated projects.

resumeItems: Operationalized GPU cluster deployment by bridging stakeholder communication and driving upstream and downstream integrations.
Built AI Foundry multi-agent systems, leveraging MCP to orchestrate cloud services, boosting scalability by \textbf{40%}.
Engineered event-driven features in Dynamics CRM, transforming data center lease acquisition workflows to boost transparency and slash operational costs by \textbf{75%}.
Automated credential management in service authentication by transitioning to Managed Service Identity (MSI), fortifying security and minimizing maintenance overhead.
Architected containerized banking microservices with Spring Boot and NodeJS, enhancing scalability and deployment agility.
Devised a secure proxy server enabling encrypted client-teller collaboration for \textbf{600+} branches and \textbf{1000+} tellers, ensuring seamless operations.

Elevated bank teller UX by implementing real-time WebSocket data streaming, reducing latency by \textbf{99.9%} and empowering critical operations like secure money transfers and interbranch cash shipments.
Modernized legacy systems by integrating OpenTelemetry SDK, ensuring compliance with engineering excellence standards and mitigating security vulnerabilities.
Streamlined data center lease workflows by designing upstream integrations, automating processes, and cutting manual costs by \textbf{50%}.
Led the development of MERN stack applications, advancing wildlife conservation through innovative mobile and desktop solutions.
Collaborated with stakeholders to prioritize features, ensuring alignment with conservation objectives and user needs.
\textbf{Languages}: Python, TypeScript (Node, Next), C, C# (.NET), Java (Spring Boot), SQL, Shell Script.
\textbf{Backend}: Distributed Systems Architecture, SOLID Design Patterns, database design & scale, OAuth, RBAC.
\textbf{Tools and Frameworks}: Event-Driven (Kafka, Azure Service Bus), Firebase, Power Platform, REST APIs, MCP.
\textbf{DevOps and Cloud}: CI/CD Pipelines (Jenkins, ADO, GH Actions), IaC (Bicep, ARM), Kubernetes, Azure, GCP.
Empowered \textbf{50+} architects to collaborate on PlantUML diagrams in real-time via a WebSocket-powered solution.
Secured architectural assets with Firebase authentication, delivering robust access control and data integrity.

subheadings.position: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
resumeItems: Relevant coursework: Data Structures and Algorithms, Machine Learning, Cloud Computing, Distributed Systems
